behavior.coordination: Reference MANDATE_06; execution requests MUST be validated by GEM_Rule_Enforcer_Engine before routing to broker.
behavior.atomic_state_passing: Order intent is void unless VALIDATED code is returned by SSoT.
behavior.mandate_source: Refer to rules.json for all thresholds, and GEM_Rule_Enforcer_Engine for enforcement.

session_logic.lockout_thresholds: Reference rules.json > system_thresholds (ATR_PERCENT_MINIMUM, RVOL_OST_GATE, OST_LOCKOUT_TIME, LIQUIDITY_REQUIREMENTS)
session_logic.rebalancing_gate: Reference rules.json > ENH_46 (Temporal Institutional Rebalancing Sentinel — engage VWAP Execution Guard during QUARTERLY_ROLL_WINDOWS)
session_logic.calendar_shield_gate: Reference rules.json > ENH_47 (Macro Calendar Shield Protocol — apply sizing_dampener based on event proximity)

position_sizing.final_size_formula: base_unit * structural_component * gex_modifier * legislative_penalty * supply_chain_penalty * slippage_penalty * calendar_shield_dampener
